feedback_text: The doctors and nurses were absolutely wonderful. I felt cared for and respected throughout my entire stay. Everything was explained clearly and I had no concerns.
I waited over four hours in the emergency room without anyone checking on me. The waiting area was dirty and understaffed. Very disappointing experience.
The surgical team was professional and the recovery room staff were kind. Wait times were a bit long but the care quality made up for it.
My child was treated with such kindness. The pediatric nurses went above and beyond to make the experience less scary. Truly outstanding care.
The MRI scan itself was fine but waiting over two hours for a scheduled appointment is unacceptable. Please fix the scheduling system.
Terrible experience. The doctor was rude and dismissive. The room was dirty and my concerns were completely ignored. I will not return to this hospital.
The wait was long as expected in an emergency department but the nursing staff were exceptional. Very thorough and reassuring. Good overall care.
My cancer treatment journey has been supported brilliantly by this team. The oncologists are world-class and I feel genuinely cared for.
Professional and respectful staff. I felt comfortable discussing sensitive issues. The appointment ran close to schedule which I appreciated.
The physiotherapy exercises prescribed were incorrect for my condition. I had to seek a second opinion elsewhere. Billing was also confusing and overcharged me.
Exceptional diagnosis and treatment plan. The neurologist took time to explain everything in detail. I left feeling confident in my care plan.
Emergency rooms are always stressful but the nurses here made it bearable. Doctor seemed rushed but was competent. Long wait but understandable.
Follow-up appointment was well organised. The cardiologist reviewed all my test results thoroughly. Clean and well-maintained facilities.
The pediatrician barely listened to my concerns about my daughter. Felt very rushed and the prescription seemed generic. Disappointed with the care.
Ultra-modern scanning equipment and very professional radiologist. Results were explained clearly the same day. Excellent service.
The chemotherapy nursing team is excellent but the administrative side is chaotic. Appointment letters had wrong times and billing was incorrect twice.
Absolutely wonderful antenatal care. The midwife team was supportive
column9: knowledgeable and always available. Could not ask for better.

feedback_text: Waited five hours for what turned out to be a broken wrist. Staff were rude and dismissive. The environment was filthy. This is unacceptable healthcare.
The neurology team handled my migraine diagnosis with care and expertise. Treatment plan is working well and follow-ups are prompt.
My hip replacement surgery and recovery have been managed perfectly. The surgical team is outstanding. Highly recommend this department.
Stress test was well administered but I waited nearly 90 minutes past my appointment. The waiting area needs better air conditioning. Doctor was good.
The children's ward is a wonderful environment. Staff make the children feel at ease. My son actually said he wasn't scared of hospital anymore.
Scheduling is a disaster. I had my CT scan cancelled three times due to equipment issues. When it finally happened the staff were fine but the delays are inexcusable.
The palliative care team provided my family member with dignity and compassion. Words cannot express our gratitude. Truly exceptional human beings.
Came in with chest pain and was seen quickly which I appreciated. All tests were explained and the discharge process was clear. Good emergency care.
Average experience. Nothing particularly wrong but nothing stood out. The appointment felt rushed and I wish the doctor had answered my questions more fully.
I was misdiagnosed initially which caused weeks of unnecessary anxiety. When I sought a second opinion the error was found. The hospital should apologise.
World-class cardiology team. My stent procedure was explained thoroughly and the post-operative care was exceptional. Feel like a new person. Thank you.
The knee arthroscopy was quick and the surgeon explained everything before and after. Recovery support materials were helpful and clear.
The paediatrician was knowledgeable but communication with parents could be improved. I had to ask multiple times for updates. Facilities are good though.
I was involved in a road accident and the emergency team saved my life. Forever grateful. The trauma team was professional and incredibly fast.
Smooth and professional experience. The ultrasound technician was thorough and reassuring. Results were ready sooner than expected. Very happy.
The treatment protocol seems outdated compared to what I have read online. The ward is understaffed and the cleaning schedule is clearly not being followed.
The hysteroscopy procedure went smoothly. The team was sensitive and professional throughout. Post-procedure care was thorough. Highly recommend.
EEG test was conducted professionally. The neurologist was patient and explained the results in plain language which I appreciated greatly.
The ECG results were misread initially and I was sent home incorrectly. Only when I came back was the correct diagnosis made. Dangerous mistake.
Standard emergency room visit. Long wait as usual but the doctor was attentive when she finally saw me. Facility could be cleaner but the care was decent.
The physiotherapist seemed unqualified and gave me exercises that worsened my injury. I am now seeking legal advice about the standard of care received.
The neonatal team looking after our premature baby have been extraordinary. Their expertise and empathy during an extremely difficult time was remarkable.
The imaging was fine but the reporting turnaround was very slow. It took over a week to get my results which caused significant anxiety. Improve the reporting speed.
The oncology nurses are the heart of this department. Incredibly compassionate. The doctors are also excellent though sometimes hard to get hold of.
Felt completely rushed during my consultation. The doctor didn't make eye contact once. My questions about the diagnosis were dismissed. Very poor bedside manner.
Successfully diagnosed my epilepsy after years of searching for answers. The neurology team was meticulous. I finally have an effective treatment plan.
Annual cardiac checkup was thorough and reassuring. All test results explained in detail. The clinic runs efficiently and on time. Very professional.
Brought my elderly mother in with a fall and we waited over three hours. For an elderly patient this is inappropriate triage. The staff were polite but overwhelmed.
My spinal surgery outcome has been life-changing. The surgical team's skill and the rehabilitation programme have exceeded all expectations. Deeply grateful.
The allergy testing for my child was well organised and conducted sensitively. The allergist explained all results clearly and provided a detailed action plan.
My biopsy results were sent to the wrong patient. This is a catastrophic privacy and safety failure. Extremely distressing and completely unacceptable.
Completed my final round of chemotherapy. The entire oncology team has been my rock. Their dedication to patient wellbeing is truly inspirational. Thank you all.
The fertility consultation was handled with sensitivity and professionalism. Options were explained clearly without pressure. Felt supported and informed.
The appointment itself was fine but the referral from my GP took three months. Once I got here the neurologist was helpful. System-level delays are the problem.
Emergency cardiac intervention was carried out flawlessly. The cardiac care unit team was exceptional. I genuinely believe they saved my life. Outstanding.
Extremely competent medical staff. The wait was long but I was kept informed throughout which made a big difference. Nurses were warm and attentive.
The treatment was adequate but communication about next steps was lacking. I had to follow up multiple times to get my physiotherapy referral processed.
The ward was noisy and understaffed during the night shift. My child was distressed and it took a very long time for nursing staff to respond to the call button.
Cutting-edge PET scan technology and a very professional nuclear medicine team. Results were detailed and communicated clearly. Excellent department.
The immunotherapy programme is well managed. Side effects were anticipated and handled proactively. The specialist nurse is an absolute star. Very good care.
The obstetrics team who delivered my twins were phenomenal. Their skill and calmness during a complicated delivery was extraordinary. Forever thankful.
Prescribed medication that I had previously reported as causing adverse reactions. This information was in my notes. A serious and avoidable error. Very concerned.
The cardiac rehabilitation programme has been transformative. The team is encouraging and the programme is well structured. Feeling much stronger each week.
